query: SELECT COLUMN_NAME, DATA_TYPE, IS_NULLABLE, COLUMN_DEFAULT FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_SCHEMA = DATABASE() AND TABLE_NAME = 'system_config' ORDER BY ORDINAL_POSITION;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2jGgPCERyrvb2fZ.e6480e658f64 --database gjgL2sFxYNbZjhUM6i4tZH --execute SELECT COLUMN_NAME, DATA_TYPE, IS_NULLABLE, COLUMN_DEFAULT FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_SCHEMA = DATABASE() AND TABLE_NAME = 'system_config' ORDER BY ORDINAL_POSITION;
stdout:
COLUMN_NAME	DATA_TYPE	IS_NULLABLE	COLUMN_DEFAULT
id	int	NO	NULL
bloqueio_followup_ativo	tinyint	NO	1
percentual_minimo_desbloqueio	int	NO	60
